sourcesContent: import React, { useState } from 'react' import { CContainer, CHeader, CHeaderBrand, CHeaderNav, CHeaderToggler, CForm, CFormInput, CButton, CSidebarBrand, CDropdown,CDropdownDivider, CDropdownHeader, CDropdownItem, CDropdownMenu, CDropdownToggle } from '@coreui/react' import { cilAccountLogout} from '@coreui/icons' import CIcon from '@coreui/icons-react' const Header = () => { const [sidebarShow, setSidebarShow] = useState(true); return ( {/* */} setSidebarShow(!sidebarShow)}> {/* */} {"Dheeraj Khanna"} Account Logout ) } export default Header;
